category_sources: source_facts.description says "Git for Data" and source_facts.homepage points to the official dolthub/dolt repository; official Dolt docs describe Git-style version control for a SQL database.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dolt; official docs and repository identify the project as Dolt.
docs_sources: Official DoltHub documentation site for Dolt.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/dolthub/dolt, so repo lookup was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official Dolt documentation support SQL database, data versioning, and CLI tags.
